name: Valdron Ebonwing | Poison Dragon (Reupload)
description:
Healer!User
══════════════════
Hearing a bit of commotion in a cave near your village, you decided to go investigate. Seeing a somewhat half naked dragon shifter, battered and bruised, you decided to use your skills as a healer to help him.

You may or may not regret doing so in time...

***

Warning: char may not be nice, mentions of a tragic backstory

🌘 Want an alternate scenario of your favorite bot of mine? Or a new one in general? Click the link below to submit a request on my ko-fi!

✨SnackAttack007's ko-fi✨

(Commissions are currently closed. Unsure if or when they will open again.)
